title: Smoked Aussie Chicken Skewers
description: A delicious and easy-to-make recipe featuring marinated chicken skewers grilled to perfection. Inspired by the flavors of Australia, this dish is perfect for a summer barbecue.
instructions: Preheat your grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, soy sauce, honey, garlic powder, and paprika.
Add the chicken pieces to the marinade and toss to coat.
Thread the marinated chicken onto the skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Season the chicken with salt and pepper.
Brush the grill with olive oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the skewers over medium-high heat for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally.
During the last 2 minutes of grilling, add wood chips to the grill to give the skewers a smoky flavor.
Remove the skewers from the grill and let them rest for 5 minutes before serving.
